falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 12% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and prove the HOLD signal incorrect by showing strong bullish momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average with a volume surge >200% of 30-day average on the crossover day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bullish trend reversal, directly contradicting the pattern's implied bearish setup and invalidating the HOLD call

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 (a 40% decline from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme complacency in volatility would falsify the blowoff score's implied risk and prove the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect by showing no impending market stress

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
